meta.title: The LONG list of new STEALTH JETS America has in testing
meta.description:
Despite all the buzz about China's new stealth aircraft in testing, it's important to contextualize these developments in the broader scope of international competition — because while China has made significant strides in recent years, they are still playing catch up in the realm of low observable aviation.
